calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There was an appearance for defendant's counsel on court call. There being no appearance by plaintiff, or objection filed, the Court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
